description: Take profit or stop the jump - which is bigger?

RU[Japanese]SZ[9]KM[0.00]
PW[White]PB[Black]AW[dc][fc][gc][dd][ed][fe][he][gf][gg][eh][fh][gh][hh][ih]AB[cb][cc][cd][be][de][cf][ef][cg][eg][dh][di][ei][gi][hi]C[No komi, no prisoners yet - White to win.]PL[W]

;B[bb]CR[bb]C[RIGHT You won by 1. Due to the gap in Whites stones on the 3rd line at 'E7', the correct way to stop the monkey jump is with placement at 'D9'. When the value of sente is > 2, this is better 
than blocking at 'D8' (after which Black can hane and connect in sente).])
(;B[ca]CR[ca]C[B will not play this.]
